zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Kingsley於大約1100年出生在英國英格蘭爾金斯利時，她的父親Adam de Kingsley24歲，母親Mrs Adam De Kingsley-2歲。她和Baron William le Gras or Grace至少有1個兒子。她去世於1175年在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Kingsley于大约1100年出生在英国英格兰爾金斯利时，她的父亲Adam de Kingsley24岁，母亲Mrs Adam De Kingsley-2岁。她和Baron William le Gras or Grace至少有1个儿子。她去世于1175年在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kingsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Kingsley, in Cheshire, Hampshire, and Staffordshire. The placenames derive from Old English cing ‘king’ (genitive cinges) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Kingsley was born about 1100, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam de Kingsley, was 24 and her mother, Mrs Adam De Kingsley, was -2. She had at least 1 son with Baron William le Gras or Grace. She died in 1175, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Kingsley est née environ 1100, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Kingsley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs Adam De Kingsley, avait -2 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Baron William le Gras or Grace. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Kingsley um 1100 in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Kingsley 24 und ihre Mutter Mrs Adam De Kingsley -2. Sie hatte mit Baron William le Gras or Grace mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Kingsley è nata il circa 1100 nel Kingsley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Adam de Kingsley, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mrs Adam De Kingsley, aveva -2 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Baron William le Gras or Grace. Morì nel 1175, nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Kingsleyが約1100年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで生まれた時，父Adam de Kingsleyは24歳，母Mrs Adam De Kingsleyは-2歳であった。彼女はBaron William le Gras or Graceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1175年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Kingsley(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨그슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Kingsley(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Adam De Kingsley(은)는 -2세였다. 그녀는 Baron William le Gras or Grace(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Kingsley родилась около 1100 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam de Kingsley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Adam De Kingsley, -2. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Baron William le Gras or Grace. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.
